raw_sql:
SELECT 
    category,
    COUNT(*) as incident_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) as avg_resolution_hours,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) as median_resolution_hours,
    ROUND(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) as max_resolution_hours
FROM flag_11
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY avg_resolution_hours DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    category,
    COUNT(*) as incident_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) as avg_resolution_hours,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(?n) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) as median_resolution_hours,
    ROUND(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) as max_resolution_hours
FROM flag_11
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY avg_resolution_hours DESC;

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) as month,
    COUNT(*) as incident_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) as avg_resolution_hours
FROM flag_11
WHERE category = 'Hardware'
    AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
ORDER BY month;

    AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
    priority,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE opened_at < '2023-07-01') as count_pre_july,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) FILTER (WHERE opened_at < '2023-07-01')::numeric, 2) as avg_hours_pre_july,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE opened_at >= '2023-07-01') as count_post_july,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) FILTER (WHERE opened_at >= '2023-07-01')::numeric, 2) as avg_hours_post_july
FROM flag_11
WHERE category = 'Hardware'
    AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY priority
ORDER BY priority;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    state,
    COUNT(*) as count,
    MIN(opened_at)::date as earliest_open,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(closed_at, NOW()) - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) as avg_age_hours
FROM flag_11
WHERE category = 'Hardware'
    AND opened_at >= '2023-07-01'
GROUP BY state
ORDER BY count DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600 < 500 THEN '< 500h'
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600 < 1000 THEN '500-1000h'
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600 < 1500 THEN '1000-1500h'
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600 < 2000 THEN '1500-2000h'
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600 < 2500 THEN '2000-2500h'
        ELSE '2500h+'
    END as resolution_bucket,
    COUNT(*) as count,
    MIN(opened_at)::date as earliest,
    MAX(opened_at)::date as latest
FROM flag_11
WHERE category = 'Hardware'
    AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND opened_at >= '2023-07-01'
GROUP BY resolution_bucket
ORDER BY MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600);
template:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n < ?n THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END as resolution_bucket,
    COUNT(*) as count,
    MIN(opened_at)::date as earliest,
    MAX(opened_at)::date as latest
FROM flag_11
WHERE category = ?s
    AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND opened_at >= ?s
GROUP BY resolution_bucket
ORDER BY MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n);

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN ((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / '3600'::numeric) < '500'::numeric) THEN '< 500h'::text WHEN ((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / '3600'::numeric) < '1000'::numeric) THEN '500-1000h'::text WHEN ((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / '3600'::numeric) < '1500'::numeric) THEN '1000-1500h'::text WHEN ((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / '3600'::numeric) < '2000'::numeric) THEN '1500-2000h'::text WHEN ((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / '3600'::numeric) < '2500'::numeric) THEN '2000-2500h'::text ELSE '2500h+'::text END

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at >= '2023-07-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) AND (category = 'Hardware'::text))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    closed_at::date as close_date,
    COUNT(*) as incidents_closed,
    MIN(opened_at)::date as earliest_opened,
    MAX(opened_at)::date as latest_opened,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/86400)::numeric, 1) as avg_days_open
FROM flag_11
WHERE category = 'Hardware'
    AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND opened_at >= '2023-07-01'
GROUP BY closed_at::date
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY close_date;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    date_series.d::date as date,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.number) as opened,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.number) as closed
FROM generate_series('2023-06-01'::date, '2024-02-29'::date, '1 week'::interval) date_series(d)
LEFT JOIN flag_11 o ON o.category = 'Hardware' 
    AND o.opened_at::date >= date_series.d 
    AND o.opened_at::date < date_series.d + interval '7 days'
LEFT JOIN flag_11 c ON c.category = 'Hardware' 
    AND c.closed_at::date >= date_series.d 
    AND c.closed_at::date < date_series.d + interval '7 days'
    AND c.closed_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY date_series.d
ORDER BY date_series.d;
template:
SELECT 
    date_series.d::date as date,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.number) as opened,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.number) as closed
FROM generate_series(?s::date, ?s::date, ?s::interval) date_series(d)
LEFT JOIN flag_11 o ON o.category = ?s 
    AND o.opened_at::date >= date_series.d 
    AND o.opened_at::date < date_series.d + interval ?s
LEFT JOIN flag_11 c ON c.category = ?s 
    AND c.closed_at::date >= date_series.d 
    AND c.closed_at::date < date_series.d + interval ?s
    AND c.closed_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY date_series.d
ORDER BY date_series.d;

predicates: (((c.closed_at)::date >= date_series.d) AND ((c.closed_at)::date < (date_series.d + '7 days'::interval)))
(((o.opened_at)::date >= date_series.d) AND ((o.opened_at)::date < (date_series.d + '7 days'::interval)))
(category = 'Hardware'::text)
((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (category = 'Hardware'::text))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    caller_id,
    COUNT(*) as total_incidents,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE opened_at < '2023-07-01') as pre_july,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE opened_at >= '2023-07-01') as post_july,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/86400)::numeric, 1) as avg_days_to_close,
    MIN(opened_at)::date as first_incident,
    MAX(opened_at)::date as last_incident
FROM flag_11
WHERE category = 'Hardware'
    AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY caller_id
ORDER BY post_july DESC
LIMIT 15;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    opened_at::date as open_date,
    COUNT(*) as incidents_that_day,
    array_agg(DISTINCT caller_id ORDER BY caller_id) as callers,
    array_agg(DISTINCT location ORDER BY location) as locations
FROM flag_11
WHERE category = 'Hardware'
    AND opened_at >= '2023-07-18'
    AND opened_at < '2023-09-01'
GROUP BY opened_at::date
ORDER BY open_date;
template:
SELECT 
    opened_at::date as open_date,
    COUNT(*) as incidents_that_day,
    array_agg(DISTINCT caller_id ORDER BY caller_id) as callers,
    array_agg(DISTINCT location ORDER BY location) as locations
FROM flag_11
WHERE category = ?s
    AND opened_at >= ?s
    AND opened_at < ?s
GROUP BY opened_at::date
ORDER BY open_date;

predicates: ((opened_at >= '2023-07-18 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) AND (opened_at < '2023-09-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) AND (category = 'Hardware'::text))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    caller_id,
    opened_at::date as open_date,
    COUNT(*) as tickets_that_day,
    array_agg(location ORDER BY location) as locations,
    array_agg(short_description ORDER BY short_description) as descriptions
FROM flag_11
WHERE category = 'Hardware'
    AND caller_id = 'Don Goodliffe'
    AND opened_at >= '2023-07-18'
    AND opened_at < '2023-08-15'
GROUP BY caller_id, opened_at::date
ORDER BY open_date
LIMIT 20;
template:
SELECT 
    caller_id,
    opened_at::date as open_date,
    COUNT(*) as tickets_that_day,
    array_agg(location ORDER BY location) as locations,
    array_agg(short_description ORDER BY short_description) as descriptions
FROM flag_11
WHERE category = ?s
    AND caller_id = ?s
    AND opened_at >= ?s
    AND opened_at < ?s
GROUP BY caller_id, opened_at::date
ORDER BY open_date
LIMIT ?n;

predicates: ((opened_at >= '2023-07-18 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) AND (opened_at < '2023-08-15 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) AND (category = 'Hardware'::text) AND (caller_id = 'Don Goodliffe'::text))
